=============================================================================\\\\\\\\n// src/api/middleware/conversationAuth.ts\\\\\\\\n// Middleware for conversation-level access control\\\\\\\\n// Checks that the authenticated user has access to the requested conversation\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nimport type { FastifyRequest, FastifyReply } from 'fastify';\\\\\\\\nimport { getConversationService } from '../../services/conversationService.js';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Fastify preHandler that verifies the current user has access to the\\\\\\\\n * conversation identified by &#96;request.params.id&#96;.\\\\\\\\n *\\\\\\\\n * Must be used AFTER &#96;authenticateOrApiKey&#96; so that &#96;request.user&#96; is populated.\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport async function checkConversationAccess(\\\\\\\\n  request: FastifyRequest&lt;{ Params: { id: string } }&gt;,\\\\\\\\n  reply: FastifyReply\\\\\\\\n): Promise&lt;void&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  const conversationId = request.params.id;\\\\\\\\n  const user = request.user;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  if (!user) {\\\\\\\\n    reply.code(401).send({\\\\\\\\n      statusCode: 401,\\\\\\\\n      error: 'Unauthorized',\\\\\\\\n      message: 'Authentication required',\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n    return;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const conversationService = getConversationService();\\\\\\\\n  const hasAccess = await conversationService.checkAccess(\\\\\\\\n    conversationId,\\\\\\\\n    user.id,\\\\\\\\n    user.email,\\\\\\\\n    user.role\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  if (!hasAccess) {\\\\\\\\n    reply.code(403).send({\\\\\\\\n      statusCode: 403,\\\\\\\\n      error: 'Forbidden',\\\\\\\\n      message: 'You do not have access to this conversation',\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n    return;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":49}\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"007b96b6-8a2e-4234-b7f5-7799e4ee6c33\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"65337395-51ca-4ca3-b4e0-d195fae667a4\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-02-17T12:47:47.202Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\": { FastifyRequest, FastifyReply } from 'fastify';\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\nimport { validateApiKey } from './apiKey.js';\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\nexport async function authenticateOrApiKey(\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n  request: FastifyRequest,\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n  reply: FastifyReply\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n): Promise&lt;void&gt; {\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n  let jwtError = null;\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n  // 1. Try JWT\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n  if (request.headers.authorization) {\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n    try {\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n      await request.jwtVerify();\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n      return;\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n      } catch (err: any) {\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n      jwtError = err;\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n  // 2. Try API Key\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n    await validateApiKey(request, reply);\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n    return;\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n  } catch (apiKeyError: any) {\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n    // If both failed, throw error\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n    // If JWT was attempted and failed, maybe return that error?\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n    // Or return a generic 401.\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n    reply.code(401).send({\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n      statusCode: 401,\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n      error: 'Unauthorized',\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n      message: 'Authentication required (JWT or API Key)',\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n      // Only include details in dev/debug if needed, but for now helpful\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n      details: {\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n        jwt: jwtError?.message,\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n        apiKey: apiKeyError.message\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n    return; // Stop execution\\\\\\\\r\\\\\\\\n =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n// src/config/index.ts\\\\\\\\n// Zod-validated configuration with defaults\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nimport { z } from 'zod';\\\\\\\\nimport dotenv from 'dotenv';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// Load environment variables\\\\\\\\ndotenv.config();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n// Schema Definition\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst configSchema = z.object({\\\\\\\\n  // Server\\\\\\\\n  port: z.coerce.number().default(3000),\\\\\\\\n  host: z.string().default('0.0.0.0'),\\\\\\\\n  nodeEnv: z.enum(['development', 'production', 'test']).default('development'),\\\\\\\\n  logLevel: z.enum(['trace', 'debug', 'info', 'warn', 'error', 'fatal']).default('info'),\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // Database (postgres:// URLs don't pass standard URL validation)\\\\\\\\n  databaseUrl: z.string().startsWith('postgres'),\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // Redis (redis:// URLs don't pass standard URL validation)\\\\\\\\n  redisUrl: z.string().startsWith('redis'),\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // Security\\\\\\\\n  jwtSecret: z.string().min(32),\\\\\\\\n  webhookSecret: z.string().min(16),\\\\\\\\n  corsOrigin: z.string().optional(),\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // Encryption (AES-256-GCM for passwords, tokens, etc.)\\\\\\\\n  encryptionKey: z.string().regex(/^[0-9a-fA-F]{64}$/, 'Must be 64 hex characters (32 bytes)').optional(),\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // API Keys (parsed from comma-separated string)\\\\\\\\n  apiKeys: z.array(z.object({\\\\\\\\n    key: z.string(),\\\\\\\\n    source: z.string()\\\\\\\\n  })).default([]),\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // Moco Integration\\\\\\\\n  moco: z.object({\\\\\\\\n    apiKey: z.string().nullish(),\\\\\\\\n    subdomain: z.string().nullish(),\\\\\\\\n    enabled: z.boolean().default(false)\\\\\\\\n  }),\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // Slack Integration\\\\\\\\n  slack: z.object({\\\\\\\\n    webhookUrl: z.string().url().nullish(),\\\\\\\\n    botToken: z.string().nullish(),\\\\\\\\n    enabled: z.boolean().default(false)\\\\\\\\n  }),\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // Cituro Integration\\\\\\\\n  cituro: z.object({\\\\\\\\n    apiKey: z.string().nullish(),\\\\\\\\n    subdomain: z.string().nullish(),\\\\\\\\n    enabled: z.boolean().default(false)\\\\\\\\n  }),\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // LinkedIn Integration\\\\\\\\n  linkedin: z.object({\\\\\\\\n    clientId: z.string().nullish(),\\\\\\\\n    clientSecret: z.string().nullish(),\\\\\\\\n    redirectUri: z.string().default('http://localhost:3000/api/v1/linkedin/callback'),\\\\\\\\n    // SNAP (Sales Navigator API) partner credentials\\\\\\\\n    snapPartnerId: z.string().nullish(),\\\\\\\\n    // Third-party gateway (e.g. Unipile)\\\\\\\\n    gatewayUrl: z.string().nullish(),\\\\\\\\n    gatewayApiKey: z.string().nullish(),\\\\\\\\n    enabled: z.boolean().default(false)\\\\\\\\n  }),\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // SMTP Configuration\\\\\\\\n  smtp: z.object({\\\\\\\\n    host: z.string().nullish(),\\\\\\\\n    port: z.coerce.number().default(587),\\\\\\\\n    user: z.string().nullish(),\\\\\\\\n    pass: z.string().nullish(),\\\\\\\\n    secure: z.boolean().default(false),\\\\\\\\n    from: z.string().nullish(),\\\\\\\\n    fromName: z.string().default('DNA ME'),\\\\\\\\n    enabled: z.boolean().default(false)\\\\\\\\n  }),\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // Feature Flags\\\\\\\\n  features: z.object({\\\\\\\\n    mocoSync: z.boolean().default(false),\\\\\\\\n    slackAlerts: z.boolean().default(false),\\\\\\\\n    scoreDecay: z.boolean().default(true)\\\\\\\\n  }),\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // Rate Limiting\\\\\\\\n  rateLimit: z.object({\\\\\\\\n    max: z.coerce.number().default(100),\\\\\\\\n    timeWindow: z.coerce.number().default(60000)\\\\\\\\n  })\\\\\\\\n});\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport type Config = z.infer&lt;typeof configSchema&gt;;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n// Parse API Keys\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunction parseApiKeys(envValue: string | undefined): Array&lt;{ key: string; source: string }&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  if (!envValue) return [];\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  return envValue.split(',').map(pair =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    const [key, source] = pair.split(':');\\\\\\\\n    return { key: key.trim(), source: source?.trim() || 'unknown' };\\\\\\\\n  }).filter(item =&gt; item.key);\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n// Parse Boolean\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunction parseBoolean(value: string | undefined, defaultValue: boolean): boolean {\\\\\\\\n  if (value === undefined) return defaultValue;\\\\\\\\n  return value.toLowerCase() === 'true';\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n// Load and Validate Configuration\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunction loadConfig(): Config {\\\\\\\\n  const rawConfig = {\\\\\\\\n    port: process.env.PORT,\\\\\\\\n    host: process.env.HOST,\\\\\\\\n    nodeEnv: process.env.NODE_ENV,\\\\\\\\n    logLevel: process.env.LOG_LEVEL,\\\\\\\\n    databaseUrl: process.env.DATABASE_URL,\\\\\\\\n    redisUrl: process.env.REDIS_URL,\\\\\\\\n    jwtSecret: process.env.JWT_SECRET,\\\\\\\\n    webhookSecret: process.env.WEBHOOK_SECRET,\\\\\\\\n    corsOrigin: process.env.CORS_ORIGIN || undefined,\\\\\\\\n    encryptionKey: process.env.ENCRYPTION_KEY || undefined,\\\\\\\\n    apiKeys: parseApiKeys(process.env.API_KEYS),\\\\\\\\n    moco: {\\\\\\\\n      apiKey: process.env.MOCO_API_KEY || undefined,\\\\\\\\n      subdomain: process.env.MOCO_SUBDOMAIN || process.env.MOCO_ACCOUNT_ID || undefined,\\\\\\\\n      enabled: parseBoolean(process.env.ENABLE_MOCO_SYNC, false)\\\\\\\\n    },\\\\\\\\n    slack: {\\\\\\\\n      webhookUrl: process.env.SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL || undefined,\\\\\\\\n      botToken: process.env.SLACK_BOT_TOKEN || undefined,\\\\\\\\n      enabled: parseBoolean(process.env.ENABLE_SLACK_ALERTS, false)\\\\\\\\n    },\\\\\\\\n    cituro: {\\\\\\\\n      apiKey: process.env.CITURO_API_KEY || undefined,\\\\\\\\n      subdomain: process.env.CITURO_SUBDOMAIN || undefined,\\\\\\\\n      enabled: parseBoolean(process.env.ENABLE_CITURO, false)\\\\\\\\n    },\\\\\\\\n    linkedin: {\\\\\\\\n      clientId: process.env.LINKEDIN_CLIENT_ID || undefined,\\\\\\\\n      clientSecret: process.env.LINKEDIN_CLIENT_SECRET || undefined,\\\\\\\\n      redirectUri: process.env.LINKEDIN_REDIRECT_URI || 'http://localhost:3000/api/v1/linkedin/callback',\\\\\\\\n      snapPartnerId: process.env.LINKEDIN_SNAP_PARTNER_ID || undefined,\\\\\\\\n      gatewayUrl: process.env.LINKEDIN_GATEWAY_URL || undefined,\\\\\\\\n      gatewayApiKey: process.env.LINKEDIN_GATEWAY_API_KEY || undefined,\\\\\\\\n      enabled: parseBoolean(process.env.ENABLE_LINKEDIN, false)\\\\\\\\n    },\\\\\\\\n    smtp: {\\\\\\\\n      host: process.env.SMTP_HOST || undefined,\\\\\\\\n      port: process.env.SMTP_PORT,\\\\\\\\n      user: process.env.SMTP_USER || undefined,\\\\\\\\n      pass: process.env.SMTP_PASS || undefined,\\\\\\\\n      secure: parseBoolean(process.env.SMTP_SECURE, false),\\\\\\\\n      from: process.env.SMTP_FROM || undefined,\\\\\\\\n      fromName: process.env.SMTP_FROM_NAME || 'DNA ME',\\\\\\\\n      enabled: !!(process.env.SMTP_HOST &amp;&amp; process.env.SMTP_USER &amp;&amp; process.env.SMTP_PASS)\\\\\\\\n    },\\\\\\\\n    features: {\\\\\\\\n      mocoSync: parseBoolean(process.env.ENABLE_MOCO_SYNC, false),\\\\\\\\n      slackAlerts: parseBoolean(process.env.ENABLE_SLACK_ALERTS, false),\\\\\\\\n      scoreDecay: parseBoolean(process.env.ENABLE_SCORE_DECAY, true)\\\\\\\\n    },\\\\\\\\n    rateLimit: {\\\\\\\\n      max: process.env.RATE_LIMIT_MAX,\\\\\\\\n      timeWindow: process.env.RATE_LIMIT_TIME_WINDOW\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const result = configSchema.safeParse(rawConfig);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  if (!result.success) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('โ Configuration validation failed:');\\\\\\\\n    console.error(result.error.format());\\\\\\\\n    throw new Error(&#96;Invalid configuration: ${result.error.message}&#96;);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  return result.data;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n// Export Configuration\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport const config = loadConfig();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// Helper to check if running in development\\\\\\\\nexport const isDev = config.nodeEnv === 'development';\\\\\\\\nexport const isProd = config.nodeEnv === 'production';\\\\\\\\nexport const isTest = config.nodeEnv === 'test';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport default config;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":212}\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"73c928f6-ebf0-426f-9cba-31a3218605f3\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"1f954e00-b632-4978-8610-ae5f89eeae18\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-02-17T12:47:47.202Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[], spaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"toolFormerData\\\":{\\\"toolCallId\\\":\\\"tool_01f500ca-b1af-4ae3-971f-824e96109cd\\\",\\\"toolIndex\\\":0,\\\"modelCallId\\\":\\\"tool_01f500ca-b1af-4ae3-971f-824e96109cd\\\",\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\",\\\"name\\\":\\\"read_file_v2\\\",\\\"rawArgs\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"e:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\dname\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\crm_dna-me\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\db\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\index.ts\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"tool\\\":40,\\\"params\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"targetFile\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"e:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\dname\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\crm_dna-me\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\db\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\index.ts\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"charsLimit\\\\\\\":1000000,\\\\\\\"effectiveUri\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"e:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\dname\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\crm_dna-me\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\db\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\index.ts\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"result\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n// src/db/index.ts\\\\\\\\n// PostgreSQL Database Connection Pool\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nimport pg from 'pg';\\\\\\\\nimport { config } from '../config/index.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { DatabaseError } from '../errors/index.js';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst { Pool } = pg;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n// Pool Configuration\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst poolConfig: pg.PoolConfig = {\\\\\\\\n  connectionString: config.databaseUrl,\\\\\\\\n  max: 20,                    // Maximum connections in pool\\\\\\\\n  min: 2,                     // Minimum connections in pool\\\\\\\\n  idleTimeoutMillis: 30000,   // Close idle connections after 30s\\\\\\\\n  connectionTimeoutMillis: 5000, // Connection timeout\\\\\\\\n  allowExitOnIdle: false\\\\\\\\n};\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n// Create Pool\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nlet pool: pg.Pool | null = null;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport function getPool(): pg.Pool {\\\\\\\\n  if (!pool) {\\\\\\\\n    pool = new Pool(poolConfig);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    pool.on('connect', () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n      console.log('โ PostgreSQL client connected');\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    pool.on('error', (err) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n      console.error('โ PostgreSQL pool error:', err.message);\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    pool.on('remove', () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n      console.log('PostgreSQL client removed from pool');\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  return pool;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n// Database Helper Class\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport class Database {\\\\\\\\n  private pool: pg.Pool;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  constructor() {\\\\\\\\n    this.pool = getPool();\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /**\\\\\\\\n   * Execute a query and return all rows\\\\\\\\n   */\\\\\\\\n  async query&lt;T = Record&lt;string, unknown&gt;&gt;(\\\\\\\\n    text: string,\\\\\\\\n    params?: unknown[]\\\\\\\\n  ): Promise&lt;T[]&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    try {\\\\\\\\n      const result = await this.pool.query(text, params);\\\\\\\\n      return result.rows as T[];\\\\\\\\n    } catch (error) {\\\\\\\\n      throw new DatabaseError(\\\\\\\\n        &#96;Query failed: ${(error as Error).message}&#96;,\\\\\\\\n        error as Error\\\\\\\\n      );\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /**\\\\\\\\n   * Execute a query and return the first row or null\\\\\\\\n   */\\\\\\\\n  async queryOne&lt;T = Record&lt;string, unknown&gt;&gt;(\\\\\\\\n    text: string,\\\\\\\\n    params?: unknown[]\\\\\\\\n  ): Promise&lt;T | null&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    const rows = await this.query&lt;T&gt;(text, params);\\\\\\\\n    return rows[0] ?? null;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /**\\\\\\\\n   * Execute a query and return the first row, throw if not found\\\\\\\\n   */\\\\\\\\n  async queryOneOrFail&lt;T = Record&lt;string, unknown&gt;&gt;(\\\\\\\\n    text: string,\\\\\\\\n    params?: unknown[],\\\\\\\\n    errorMessage: string = 'Record not found'\\\\\\\\n  ): Promise&lt;T&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    const row = await this.queryOne&lt;T&gt;(text, params);\\\\\\\\n    if (!row) {\\\\\\\\n      throw new DatabaseError(errorMessage);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    return row;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /**\\\\\\\\n   * Execute a query and return the count of affected rows\\\\\\\\n   */\\\\\\\\n  async execute(text: string, params?: unknown[]): Promise&lt;number&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    try {\\\\\\\\n      const result = await this.pool.query(text, params);\\\\\\\\n      return result.rowCount ?? 0;\\\\\\\\n    } catch (error) {\\\\\\\\n      throw new DatabaseError(\\\\\\\\n        &#96;Execute failed: ${(error as Error).message}&#96;,\\\\\\\\n        error as Error\\\\\\\\n      );\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /**\\\\\\\\n   * Run a transaction with automatic rollback on error\\\\\\\\n   */\\\\\\\\n  async transaction&lt;T&gt;(\\\\\\\\n    callback: (client: pg.PoolClient) =&gt; Promise&lt;T&gt;\\\\\\\\n  ): Promise&lt;T&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    const client = await this.pool.connect();\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    try {\\\\\\\\n      await client.query('BEGIN');\\\\\\\\n      const result = await callback(client);\\\\\\\\n      await client.query('COMMIT');\\\\\\\\n      return result;\\\\\\\\n    } catch (error) {\\\\\\\\n      await client.query('ROLLBACK');\\\\\\\\n      throw new DatabaseError(\\\\\\\\n        &#96;Transaction failed: ${(error as Error).message}&#96;,\\\\\\\\n        error as Error\\\\\\\\n      );\\\\\\\\n    } finally {\\\\\\\\n      client.release();\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /**\\\\\\\\n   * Check database connectivity\\\\\\\\n   */\\\\\\\\n  async healthCheck(): Promise&lt;boolean&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    try {\\\\\\\\n      const result = await this.queryOne&lt;{ now: Date }&gt;('SELECT NOW() as now');\\\\\\\\n      return result !== null;\\\\\\\\n    } catch {\\\\\\\\n      return false;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  /**\\\\\\\\n   * Get pool statistics\\\\\\\\n   */\\\\\\\\n  getStats() {\\\\\\\\n    return {\\\\\\\\n      totalCount: this.pool.totalCount,\\\\\\\\n      idleCount: this.pool.idleCount,\\\\\\\\n      waitingCount: this.pool.waitingCount\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n// Singleton Database Instance\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nlet dbInstance: Database | null = null;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport function getDatabase(): Database {\\\\\\\\n  if (!dbInstance) {\\\\\\\\n    dbInstance = new Database();\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  return dbInstance;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// Convenience export\\\\\\\\nexport const db = {\\\\\\\\n  get instance() {\\\\\\\\n    return getDatabase();\\\\\\\\n  },\\\\\\\\n  query: &lt;T = Record&lt;string, unknown&gt;&gt;(text: string, params?: unknown[]) =&gt; \\\\\\\\n    getDatabase().query&lt;T&gt;(text, params),\\\\\\\\n  queryOne: &lt;T = Record&lt;string, unknown&gt;&gt;(text: string, params?: unknown[]) =&gt; \\\\\\\\n    getDatabase().queryOne&lt;T&gt;(text, params),\\\\\\\\n  queryOneOrFail: &lt;T = Record&lt;string, unknown&gt;&gt;(text: string, params?: unknown[], errorMessage?: string) =&gt; \\\\\\\\n    getDatabase().queryOneOrFail&lt;T&gt;(text, params, errorMessage),\\\\\\\\n  execute: (text: string, params?: unknown[]) =&gt; \\\\\\\\n    getDatabase().execute(text, params),\\\\\\\\n  transaction: &lt;T&gt;(callback: (client: pg.PoolClient) =&gt; Promise&lt;T&gt;) =&gt; \\\\\\\\n    getDatabase().transaction&lt;T&gt;(callback),\\\\\\\\n  healthCheck: () =&gt; \\\\\\\\n    getDatabase().healthCheck(),\\\\\\\\n  getStats: () =&gt; \\\\\\\\n    getDatabase().getStats()\\\\\\\\n};\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n// Close Pool\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport async function closePool(): Promise&lt;void&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  if (pool) {\\\\\\\\n    await pool.end();\\\\\\\\n    pool = null;\\\\\\\\n    dbInstance = null;\\\\\\\\n    console.log('PostgreSQL pool closed gracefully');\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport default db;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":217}\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"12916838-cfe8-47b6-a035-a6eb7810baef\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"c4954d1e-7172-413f-acde-f0d09a8de869\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-02-17T12:47:47.202Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\" src/db/index.ts\\\\\\\\n// PostgreSQL Database Connection Pool\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nimport pg from 'pg';\\\\\\\\nimport { config } from '../config/index.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { DatabaseError } from '../errors/index.js';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst { Pool } = pg;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n// Pool Configuration\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst poolConfig: pg.PoolConfig = {\\\\\\\\n  connectionString: config.databaseUrl,\\\\\\\\n  max: 20,                    // Maximum connections in pool\\\\\\\\n  min: 2,                     // Minimum connections in pool\\\\\\\\n  idleTimeoutMillis: 30000,   // Close idle connections after 30s\\\\\\\\n  connectionTimeoutMillis: 5000, // Connection timeout\\\\\\\\n  allowExitOnIdle: false\\\\\\\\n};\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n// Create Pool\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nlet pool: pg.Pool | null = null;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport function getPool(): pg.Pool {\\\\\\\\n  if (!pool) {\\\\\\\\n    pool = new Pool(poolConfig);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    pool.on('connect', () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n      console.log('โ PostgreSQL client connected');\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n   // Close queues\\\\\\\\n    await closeQueues();\\\\\\\\n    fastify.log.info('BullMQ queues closed');\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Close Redis\\\\\\\\n    await closeRedisConnection();\\\\\\\\n process.exit(0);\\\\\\\\n  } catch (error: unknown) {\\\\\\\\n    fastify.log.error({ err: error }, 'Error during shutdown');\\\\\\\\n    process.exit(1);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n};\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nprocess.on('SIGTERM', () =&gt; shutdown('SIGTERM'));\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"signatures\\\\\\\":{},\\\\\\\"detailedLines\\\\\\\":[{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"// Create Pool with connection string from config\\\\\\\\n2. Test Framework\\\\n\\\\n- Framework: Vitest (v1.2.2)\\\\n- Test script: &#96;\\\\\\\"test\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"vitest\\\\\\\"&#96; in package.json\\\\n- E2E script: &#96;\\\\\\\"test:e2e\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"tsx scripts/test-e2e.ts\\\\\\\"&#96;\\\\n- No Vitest config file found (uses defaults)\\\\n- No existing test files found (no &#96;*.test.ts&#96;, &#96;*.spec.ts&#96;, or &#96;__tests__&#96; directories)\\\\n\\\\n## Database Access\\\\n\\\\n- Library: &#96;pg&#96; (node-postgres v8.11.3)\\\\n- Helper: Custom &#96;Database&#96; class in &#96;src/db/index.ts&#96;\\\\n- Pool configuration:\\\\n  - Max connections: 20\\\\n  - Min connections: 2\\\\n  - Idle timeout: 30s\\\\n  - Connection timeout: 5s\\\\n- Usage pattern: Singleton accessed via &#96;db&#96; export with methods:\\\\n  - &#96;db.query&lt;T&gt;()&#96; - returns array of rows\\\\n  - &#96;db.queryOne&lt;T&gt;()&#96; - returns first row or null\\\\n  - &#96;db.queryOneOrFail&lt;T&gt;()&#96; - returns first row or throws\\\\n  - &#96;db.execute()&#96; - returns affected row count\\\\n  - &#96;db.transaction()&#96; - runs a transaction with auto rollback\\\\n\\\\n## Service Files\\\\n\\\\n### &#96;src/services/messageService.ts&#96; (830 lines)\\\\nCore message service with:\\\\n- Message CRUD operations\\\\n- Email/LinkedIn sending via SMTP or user accounts\\\\n- Redis Pub/Sub for real-time events\\\\n- Typing indicators\\\\n- Status management (draft, sending, sent, error)\\\\n- Unread counts\\\\n\\\\n### &#96;src/services/conversationService.ts&#96; (751 lines)\\\\nConversation management with:\\\\n- Access control (user, participant, deal assignment, admin)\\\\n- Filtering and pagination\\\\n- Conversation CRUD\\\\n- Status management (active, archived, closed)\\\\n- Lead/deal linking\\\\n\\\\n### &#96;src/services/emailSyncService.ts&#96; (881 lines)\\\\nIMAP email synchronization with:\\\\n- Multi-account sync\\\\n- Email parsing via mailparser\\\\n- Multi-level conversation matching (In-Reply-To, Deal-ID tags, active deals, lead conversations)\\\\n- Deduplication by Message-ID\\\\n- Direction detection (inbound/outbound)\\\\n\\\\n## Middleware Files\\\\n\\\\n### &#96;src/api/middleware/auth.ts&#96; (41 lines)\\\\nDual authentication:\\\\n- JWT via &#96;@fastify/jwt&#96;\\\\n- API key fallback\\\\n- Returns 401 if both fail\\\\n\\\\n### &#96;src/api/middleware/conversationAuth.ts&#96; (49 lines)\\\\nConversation access control:\\\\n- Uses &#96;conversationService.checkAccess()&#96;\\\\n- Requires &#96;authenticateOrApiKey&#96; to run first\\\\n- Returns 403 if access denied\\\\n\\\\n## Type Files\\\\n\\\\n### &#96;src/types/index.ts&#96; (562 lines)\\\\nTypeScript definitions including:\\\\n- Database entities (Lead, Deal, Conversation, Message, etc.)\\\\n- Chat system types (Conversation, Message, EmailAccount, LinkedInConnection)\\\\n- Enums (MessageType, MessageDirection, MessageStatus, etc.)\\\\n- API types (PaginatedResponse, etc.)\\\\n- Job types (BullMQ)\\\\n\\\\n### &#96;src/types/fastify.d.ts&#96; (16 lines)\\\\nFastify type extensions:\\\\n- JWT payload: &#96;{ id, email, role }&#96;\\\\n- User object: &#96;{ id, email, role }&#96;\\\\n\\\\n## Config File\\\\n\\\\n### &#96;src/config/index.ts&#96; (212 lines)\\\\nZod-validated configuration:\\\\n- Server settings (port, host, env, log level)\\\\n- Database URL (PostgreSQL)\\\\n- Redis URL\\\\n- Security (JWT secret, webhook secret, encryption key)\\\\n- Integrations (Moco, Slack, Cituro, LinkedIn, SMTP)\\\\n- Feature flags\\\\n- Rate limiting\\\\n\\\\n## API Routes\\\\n\\\\n### &#96;src/api/routes/conversations.ts&#96; (1104 lines)\\\\nConversation API endpoints:\\\\n- GET &#96;/conversations&#96; - List with filters\\\\n- GET &#96;/conversations/:id&#96; - Get single conversation\\\\n- POST &#96;/conversations&#96; - Create conversation\\\\n- PATCH &#96;/conversations/:id&#96; - Update conversation\\\\n- DELETE &#96;/conversations/:id&#96; - Archive/delete\\\\n- GET &#96;/conversations/:id/messages&#96; - Get messages (with polling support)\\\\n- POST &#96;/conversations/:id/messages&#96; - Create message\\\\n- PATCH &#96;/conversations/:id/messages/:messageId&#96; - Mark as read\\\\n- POST &#96;/conversations/:id/messages/:messageId/retry&#96; - Retry failed message\\\\n- POST &#96;/conversations/:id/read&#96; - Mark all as read\\\\n- POST &#96;/conversations/:id/typing&#96; - Publish typing indicator\\\\n- GET &#96;/conversations/:id/typing&#96; - Get typing users\\\\n- GET &#96;/conversations/:id/messages/stream&#96; - SSE for real-time updates\\\\n\\\\n## Summary\\\\n\\\\n- Test framework: Vitest (no config file, no existing tests)\\\\n- Database: PostgreSQL via &#96;pg&#96; Pool, accessed through a custom &#96;Database&#96; helper class\\\\n- Architecture: Service layer (MessageService, ConversationService, EmailSyncService) with middleware for auth and access control\\\\n- Real-time: Redis Pub/Sub for SSE streaming\\\\n- Type safety: TypeScript with Zod validation\\\\n\\\\nThe codebase is ready for testing, but no test files exist yet.\\\"}\"},\"status\":\"completed\",\"context\":{\"composers\":[],\"selectedCommits\":[],\"selectedPullRequests\":[],\"selectedImages\":[],\"folderSelections\":[],\"fileSelections\":[],\"selections\":[],\"terminalSelections\":[],\"selectedDocs\":[],\"externalLinks\":[],\"cursorRules\":[],\"cursorCommands\":[],\"gitPRDiffSelections\":[],\"subagentSelections\":[],\"browserSelections\":[],\"mentions\":{\"composers\":{},\"selectedCommits\":{},\"selectedPullRequests\":{},\"gitDiff\":[],\"gitDiffFromBranchToMain\":[],\"selectedImages\":{},\"folderSelections\":{},\"fileSelections\":{},\"terminalFiles\":{},\"selections\":{},\"terminalSelections\":{},\"selectedDocs\":{},\"externalLinks\":{},\"diffHistory\":[],\"cursorRules\":{},\"cursorCommands\":{},\"uiElementSelections\":[],\"consoleLogs\":[],\"ideEditorsState\":[],\"gitPRDiffSelections\":{},\"subagentSelections\":{},\"browserSelections\":{}}},\"generatingBubbleIds\":[],\"isReadingLongFile\":false,\"codeBlockData\":{},\"originalFileStates\":{},\"newlyCreatedFiles\":[],\"newlyCreatedFolders\":[],\"createdAt\":1771330498448,\"hasChangedContext\":false,\"activeTabsShouldBeReactive\":true,\"capabilities\":[{\"type\":30,\"data\":{}},{\"type\":15,\"data\":{\"bubbleDataMap\":\"{}\"}}],\"name\":\"Explore d\\\":\\\"tool_1b453e5d-4ac4-4d49-b04f-47d8f8f139a\\\",\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\",\\\"name\\\":\\\"read_file_v2\\\",\\\"rawArgs\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"e:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\dname\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\crm_dna-me\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\index.ts\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"tool\\\":40,\\\"params\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"targetFile\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"e:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\dname\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\crm_dna-me\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\index.ts\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"charsLimit\\\\\\\":1000000,\\\\\\\"effectiveUri\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"e:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\dname\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\crm_dna-me\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\index.ts\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"result\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n// src/index.ts\\\\\\\\n// DNA Marketing Engine - Main Entry Point\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nimport Fastify from 'fastify';\\\\\\\\nimport cors from '@fastify/cors';\\\\\\\\nimport jwt from '@fastify/jwt';\\\\\\\\nimport { config, isDev } from './config/index.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { db, closePool } from './db/index.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { getRedisConnection, closeRedisConnection } from './config/redis.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { initializeQueues, closeQueues } from './config/queues.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { errorHandler, notFoundHandler } from './api/middleware/errorHandler.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { authRoutes } from './api/routes/auth.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { eventsRoutes } from './api/routes/events.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { leadsRoutes } from './api/routes/leads.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { scoringRoutes } from './api/routes/scoring.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { routingRoutes } from './api/routes/routing.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { pipelinesRoutes } from './api/routes/pipelines.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { dealsRoutes } from './api/routes/deals.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { integrationsRoutes } from './api/routes/integrations.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { tasksRoutes } from './api/routes/tasks.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { automationRoutes } from './api/routes/automation.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { gdprRoutes } from './api/routes/gdpr.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { reportsRoutes } from './api/routes/reports.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { teamRoutes } from './api/routes/team.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { campaignsRoutes } from './api/routes/campaigns.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { organizationsRoutes } from './api/routes/organizations.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { triggersRoutes } from './api/routes/triggers.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { emailRoutes } from './api/routes/email.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { sequencesRoutes } from './api/routes/sequences.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { conversationsRoutes } from './api/routes/conversations.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { linkedinRoutes } from './api/routes/linkedin.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { emailAccountsRoutes } from './api/routes/emailAccounts.js';\\\\\\\\nimport type { HealthCheckResponse } from './types/index.js';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n// Create Fastify Instance\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst fastify = Fastify({\\\\\\\\n  logger: {\\\\\\\\n    level: config.logLevel,\\\\\\\\n    transport: isDev ? {\\\\\\\\n      target: 'pino-pretty',\\\\\\\\n      options: {\\\\\\\\n        colorize: true,\\\\\\\\n        translateTime: 'HH:MM:ss',\\\\\\\\n        ignore: 'pid,hostname'\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    } : undefined\\\\\\\\n  },\\\\\\\\n  requestIdHeader: 'x-request-id',\\\\\\\\n  requestIdLogLabel: 'requestId'\\\\\\\\n});\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n// Plugins\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nawait fastify.register(cors, {\\\\\\\\n  origin: isDev ? true : (config.corsOrigin ? config.corsOrigin.split(',').map((o) =&gt; o.trim()) : ['https://crm.dna-me.com']),\\\\\\\\n  methods: ['GET', 'POST', 'PUT', 'PATCH', 'DELETE'],\\\\\\\\n  allowedHeaders: ['Content-Type', 'Authorization', 'X-API-Key', 'X-Webhook-Signature', 'X-Request-ID', 'X-Correlation-ID'],\\\\\\\\n  credentials: true\\\\\\\\n});\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nawait fastify.register(jwt, {\\\\\\\\n  secret: config.jwtSecret\\\\\\\\n});\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfastify.decorate('authenticate', async (request: any, reply: any) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    await request.jwtVerify();\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    reply.send(err);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n});\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n// Error Handling\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfastify.setErrorHandler(errorHandler);\\\\\\\\nfastify.setNotFoundHandler(notFoundHandler);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n// Health Check Endpoints\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfastify.get('/health', async (): Promise&lt;HealthCheckResponse&gt; =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  const dbHealthy = await db.healthCheck();\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  let redisHealthy = false;\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const redis = getRedisConnection();\\\\\\\\n    const pong = await redis.ping();\\\\\\\\n    redisHealthy = pong === 'PONG';\\\\\\\\n  } catch {\\\\\\\\n    redisHealthy = false;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const isHealthy = dbHealthy &amp;&amp; redisHealthy;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  return {\\\\\\\\n    status: isHealthy ? 'healthy' : 'unhealthy',\\\\\\\\n    timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),\\\\\\\\n    version: '1.0.0',\\\\\\\\n    services: {\\\\\\\\n      database: dbHealthy,\\\\\\\\n      redis: redisHealthy\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  };\\\\\\\\n});\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfastify.get('/ready', async (_request, reply) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  const dbHealthy = await db.healthCheck();\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  if (!dbHealthy) {\\\\\\\\n    reply.code(503);\\\\\\\\n    return { ready: false, reason: 'Database not available' };\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  return { ready: true };\\\\\\\\n});\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n// Database Stats Endpoint (Development only)\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nif (isDev) {\\\\\\\\n  fastify.get('/debug/db-stats', async () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    return {\\\\\\\\n      pool: db.getStats(),\\\\\\\\n      timestamp: new Date().toISOString()\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n  });\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n// Root Endpoint\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfastify.get('/', async () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  return {\\\\\\\\n    name: 'DNA Marketing Engine',\\\\\\\\n    version: '1.0.0',\\\\\\\\n    status: 'running',\\\\\\\\n    docs: '/docs',\\\\\\\\n    health: '/health'\\\\\\\\n  };\\\\\\\\n});\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n// API Routes\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nawait fastify.register(authRoutes, { prefix: '/api/v1' });\\\\\\\\nawait fastify.register(eventsRoutes, { prefix: '/api/v1' });\\\\\\\\nawait fastify.register(leadsRoutes, { prefix: '/api/v1' });\\\\\\\\nawait fastify.register(scoringRoutes, { prefix: '/api/v1' });\\\\\\\\nawait fastify.register(routingRoutes, { prefix: '/api/v1' });\\\\\\\\nawait fastify.register(pipelinesRoutes, { prefix: '/api/v1' });\\\\\\\\nawait fastify.register(dealsRoutes, { prefix: '/api/v1' });\\\\\\\\nawait fastify.register(integrationsRoutes, { prefix: '/api/v1' });\\\\\\\\nawait fastify.register(tasksRoutes, { prefix: '/api/v1' });\\\\\\\\nawait fastify.register(automationRoutes, { prefix: '/api/v1' });\\\\\\\\nawait fastify.register(gdprRoutes, { prefix: '/api/v1' });\\\\\\\\nawait fastify.register(reportsRoutes, { prefix: '/api/v1' });\\\\\\\\nawait fastify.register(teamRoutes, { prefix: '/api/v1' });\\\\\\\\nawait fastify.register(campaignsRoutes, { prefix: '/api/v1' });\\\\\\\\nawait fastify.register(organizationsRoutes, { prefix: '/api/v1' });\\\\\\\\nawait fastify.register(triggersRoutes, { prefix: '/api/v1' });\\\\\\\\nawait fastify.register(emailRoutes, { prefix: '/api/v1' });\\\\\\\\nawait fastify.register(sequencesRoutes, { prefix: '/api/v1' });\\\\\\\\nawait fastify.register(conversationsRoutes, { prefix: '/api/v1' });\\\\\\\\nawait fastify.register(linkedinRoutes, { prefix: '/api/v1' });\\\\\\\\nawait fastify.register(emailAccountsRoutes, { prefix: '/api/v1' });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n// Graceful Shutdown\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst shutdown = async (signal: string) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  fastify.log.info(&#96;Received ${signal}, shutting down gracefully...&#96;);\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    // Close HTTP server\\\\\\\\n    await fastify.close();\\\\\\\\n    fastify.log.info('HTTP server closed');\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Close queues\\\\\\\\n    await closeQueues();\\\\\\\\n    fastify.log.info('BullMQ queues closed');\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Close Redis\\\\\\\\n    await closeRedisConnection();\\\\\\\\n    fastify.log.info('Redis connection closed');\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Close database pool\\\\\\\\n    await closePool();\\\\\\\\n    fastify.log.info('Database pool closed');\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    process.exit(0);\\\\\\\\n  } catch (error: unknown) {\\\\\\\\n    fastify.log.error({ err: error }, 'Error during shutdown');\\\\\\\\n    process.exit(1);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n};\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nprocess.on('SIGTERM', () =&gt; shutdown('SIGTERM'));\\\\\\\\nprocess.on('SIGINT', () =&gt; shutdown('SIGINT'));\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n// Start Server\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst start = async () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    // Initialize database connection\\\\\\\\n    fastify.log.info('Connecting to database...');\\\\\\\\n    try {\\\\\\\\n      const dbHealthy = await db.healthCheck();\\\\\\\\n      if (!dbHealthy) {\\\\\\\\n        throw new Error('Database health check returned false');\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    } catch (dbError) {\\\\\\\\n      const err = dbError as Error;\\\\\\\\n      fastify.log.error({ err, message: err.message }, 'Database connection error');\\\\\\\\n      throw new Error(&#96;Failed to connect to database: ${err.message}&#96;);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    fastify.log.info('โ Database connected');\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Initialize Redis connection\\\\\\\\n    fastify.log.info('Connecting to Redis...');\\\\\\\\n    getRedisConnection();\\\\\\\\n    fastify.log.info('โ Redis connected');\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Initialize BullMQ queues\\\\\\\\n    fastify.log.info('Initializing queues...');\\\\\\\\n    initializeQueues();\\\\\\\\n    fastify.log.info('โ Queues initialized');\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Start listening\\\\\\\\n    await fastify.listen({ \\\\\\\\n      port: config.port, \\\\\\\\n      host: config.host \\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    fastify.log.info(&#96;\\\\\\\\nโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโ\\\\\\\\nโ                                                           โ\\\\\\\\nโ   ๐งฌ DNA Marketing Engine v1.0.0                          โ\\\\\\\\nโ                                                           โ\\\\\\\\nโ   Server running at http://${config.host}:${config.port}              โ\\\\\\\\nโ   Environment: ${config.nodeEnv.padEnd(11)}                           โ\\\\\\\\nโ                                                           โ\\\\\\\\nโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโโ\\\\\\\\n    &#96;);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  } catch (error) {\\\\\\\\n    const err = error as Error;\\\\\\\\n    fastify.log.error({ err, message: err.message, stack: err.stack }, 'Failed to start server');\\\\\\\\n    console.error('โ Startup Error:', err.message);\\\\\\\\n    console.error('Stack:', err.stack);\\\\\\\\n    process.exit(1);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n};\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nstart();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport default fastify;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":273}\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"6c19cdeb-f143-4f43-8909-775251a3457d\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"96b9b344-3394-4a93-aedc-7e26bcdb08d6\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-02-17T12:47:47.217Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[] ntLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-02-17T12:47:47.217Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"toolFormerData\\\":{\\\"toolCallId\\\":\\\"tool_0860ef45-5699-4a25-8b9f-fbdddd7872b\\\",\\\"toolIndex\\\":0,\\\"modelCallId\\\":\\\"tool_0860ef45-5699-4a25-8b9f-fbdddd7872b\\\",\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\",\\\"name\\\":\\\"read_file_v2\\\",\\\"rawArgs\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"e:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\dname\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\crm_dna-me\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\migrations\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\1771350000000_add_chat_system.sql\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"tool\\\":40,\\\"params\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"targetFile\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"e:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\dname\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\crm_dna-me\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\migrations\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\1771350000000_add_chat_system.sql\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"charsLimit\\\\\\\":1000000,\\\\\\\"effectiveUri\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"e:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\dname\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\crm_dna-me\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\migrations\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\1771350000000_add_chat_system.sql\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"result\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n-- DNA Marketing Engine - Chat System Migration\\\\\\\\n-- Adds conversations, messages, email_accounts, linkedin_connections tables\\\\\\\\n-- with GIN indexes for JSONB fields, sender_id, email_thread_id, status tracking\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- Up Migration\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n-- CONVERSATIONS\\\\\\\\n-- Zentrale Tabelle fรผr Chat-Konversationen (E-Mail, LinkedIn, interne Notizen)\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE conversations (\\\\\\\\n    id                  UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),\\\\\\\\n    lead_id             UUID REFERENCES leads(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\\\\\\\\n    deal_id             UUID REFERENCES deals(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\\\\\\\\n    type                VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'direct',\\\\\\\\n    status              VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',\\\\\\\\n    subject             VARCHAR(500),\\\\\\\\n    participant_emails  JSONB DEFAULT '[]',\\\\\\\\n    last_message_at     TIMESTAMPTZ,\\\\\\\\n    created_by_id       UUID REFERENCES team_members(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,\\\\\\\\n    created_at          TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),\\\\\\\\n    updated_at          TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    -- Mindestens lead_id ODER deal_id muss gesetzt sein\\\\\\\\n    CONSTRAINT chk_conversations_entity CHECK (lead_id IS NOT NULL OR deal_id IS NOT NULL),\\\\\\\\n    -- type muss einer der erlaubten Werte sein\\\\\\\\n    CONSTRAINT chk_conversations_type CHECK (type IN ('direct', 'group', 'internal')),\\\\\\\\n    -- status muss einer der erlaubten Werte sein\\\\\\\\n    CONSTRAINT chk_conversations_status CHECK (status IN ('active', 'archived', 'closed'))\\\\\\\\n);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n-- MESSAGES\\\\\\\\n-- Speichert alle Nachrichten (E-Mail, LinkedIn, interne Notizen, Aufgaben)\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE messages (\\\\\\\\n    id                  UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),\\\\\\\\n    conversation_id     UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES conversations(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\\\\\\\\n    sender_id           UUID REFERENCES team_members(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,\\\\\\\\n    message_type        VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'email',\\\\\\\\n    direction           VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'outbound',\\\\\\\\n    status              VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',\\\\\\\\n    sender_email        VARCHAR(255),\\\\\\\\n    sender_name         VARCHAR(255),\\\\\\\\n    recipients          JSONB DEFAULT '[]',\\\\\\\\n    subject             VARCHAR(500),\\\\\\\\n    body_html           TEXT,\\\\\\\\n    body_text           TEXT,\\\\\\\\n    metadata            JSONB DEFAULT '{}',\\\\\\\\n    attachments         JSONB DEFAULT '[]',\\\\\\\\n    external_id         VARCHAR(255),\\\\\\\\n    email_thread_id     VARCHAR(255),\\\\\\\\n    sent_at             TIMESTAMPTZ,\\\\\\\\n    read_at             TIMESTAMPTZ,\\\\\\\\n    replied_at          TIMESTAMPTZ,\\\\\\\\n    error_message       TEXT,\\\\\\\\n    created_at          TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),\\\\\\\\n    updated_at          TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    -- message_type muss einer der erlaubten Werte sein\\\\\\\\n    CONSTRAINT chk_messages_type CHECK (message_type IN ('email', 'linkedin', 'internal_note', 'task')),\\\\\\\\n    -- direction muss einer der erlaubten Werte sein\\\\\\\\n    CONSTRAINT chk_messages_direction CHECK (direction IN ('inbound', 'outbound', 'internal')),\\\\\\\\n    -- status muss einer der erlaubten Werte sein\\\\\\\\n    CONSTRAINT chk_messages_status CHECK (status IN ('draft', 'sending', 'sent', 'error'))\\\\\\\\n);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n-- EMAIL ACCOUNTS\\\\\\\\n-- IMAP/SMTP-Konfiguration fรผr E-Mail-Import und -Versand\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE email_accounts (\\\\\\\\n    id                  UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),\\\\\\\\n    team_member_id      UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES team_members(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\\\\\\\\n    email_address       VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\n    imap_host           VARCHAR(255),\\\\\\\\n    imap_port           INTEGER,\\\\\\\\n    imap_username       VARCHAR(255),\\\\\\\\n    imap_password       TEXT,\\\\\\\\n    smtp_host           VARCHAR(255),\\\\\\\\n    smtp_port           INTEGER,\\\\\\\\n    smtp_username       VARCHAR(255),\\\\\\\\n    smtp_password       TEXT,\\\\\\\\n    sync_enabled        BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,\\\\\\\\n    last_sync_at        TIMESTAMPTZ,\\\\\\\\n    sync_status         VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'idle',\\\\\\\\n    sync_error          TEXT,\\\\\\\\n    created_at          TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),\\\\\\\\n    updated_at          TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    -- sync_status muss einer der erlaubten Werte sein\\\\\\\\n    CONSTRAINT chk_email_accounts_sync_status CHECK (sync_status IN ('idle', 'syncing', 'error'))\\\\\\\\n);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n-- LINKEDIN CONNECTIONS\\\\\\\\n-- LinkedIn OAuth-Token und Verbindungsstatus\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE linkedin_connections (\\\\\\\\n    id                  UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),\\\\\\\\n    team_member_id      UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES team_members(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\\\\\\\\n    linkedin_profile_id VARCHAR(255),\\\\\\\\n    access_token        TEXT,\\\\\\\\n    refresh_token       TEXT,\\\\\\\\n    token_expires_at    TIMESTAMPTZ,\\\\\\\\n    profile_data        JSONB DEFAULT '{}',\\\\\\\\n    is_active           BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,\\\\\\\\n    last_sync_at        TIMESTAMPTZ,\\\\\\\\n    created_at          TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),\\\\\\\\n    updated_at          TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()\\\\\\\\n);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n-- B-TREE INDEXES\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- Conversations indexes\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_conversations_lead ON conversations(lead_id);\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_conversations_deal ON conversations(deal_id);\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_conversations_last_message ON conversations(last_message_at DESC);\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_conversations_status ON conversations(status);\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_conversations_created_by ON conversations(created_by_id);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- Messages indexes\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_messages_conversation_sent ON messages(conversation_id, sent_at DESC);\\\\\\\\nCREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_messages_external_id ON messages(external_id) WHERE external_id IS NOT NULL;\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_messages_email_thread ON messages(email_thread_id);\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_messages_type ON messages(message_type);\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_messages_sender ON messages(sender_id);\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_messages_status ON messages(status) WHERE status IN ('sending', 'error');\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_messages_direction ON messages(direction);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- Email accounts indexes\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_email_accounts_team_member ON email_accounts(team_member_id);\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_email_accounts_sync ON email_accounts(sync_enabled, sync_status);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- LinkedIn connections indexes\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_linkedin_connections_team_member ON linkedin_connections(team_member_id);\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_linkedin_connections_profile ON linkedin_connections(linkedin_profile_id);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n-- GIN INDEXES fรผr JSONB-Felder\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- GIN-Index auf participant_emails (fรผr Teilnehmersuche in Conversations)\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_conversations_participants ON conversations USING GIN (participant_emails);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- GIN-Index auf recipients (fรผr Empfรคngersuche in Messages)\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_messages_recipients ON messages USING GIN (recipients);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- GIN-Index auf metadata (fรผr Platform-Daten-Suche in Messages)\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_messages_metadata ON messages USING GIN (metadata);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- GIN-Index auf attachments (fรผr Anhรคnge-Suche in Messages)\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_messages_attachments ON messages USING GIN (attachments);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- GIN-Index auf profile_data (fรผr LinkedIn-Profilsuche)\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_linkedin_connections_profile_data ON linkedin_connections USING GIN (profile_data);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n-- TRIGGERS (updated_at) - nutzt die bestehende update_updated_at() Funktion\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nCREATE TRIGGER trigger_conversations_updated_at\\\\\\\\n    BEFORE UPDATE ON conversations\\\\\\\\n    FOR EACH ROW\\\\\\\\n    EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nCREATE TRIGGER trigger_messages_updated_at\\\\\\\\n    BEFORE UPDATE ON messages\\\\\\\\n    FOR EACH ROW\\\\\\\\n    EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nCREATE TRIGGER trigger_email_accounts_updated_at\\\\\\\\n    BEFORE UPDATE ON email_accounts\\\\\\\\n    FOR EACH ROW\\\\\\\\n    EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nCREATE TRIGGER trigger_linkedin_connections_updated_at\\\\\\\\n    BEFORE UPDATE ON linkedin_connections\\\\\\\\n    FOR EACH ROW\\\\\\\\n    EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n-- Down Migration (auskommentiert, manuell ausfรผhren bei Bedarf)\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trigger_linkedin_connections_updated_at ON linkedin_connections;\\\\\\\\n-- DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trigger_email_accounts_updated_at ON email_accounts;\\\\\\\\n-- DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trigger_messages_updated_at ON messages;\\\\\\\\n-- DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trigger_conversations_updated_at ON conversations;\\\\\\\\n-- DROP TABLE IF EXISTS linkedin_connections CASCADE;\\\\\\\\n-- 70cbd5b7424\\\",\\\"toolIndex\\\":0,\\\"modelCallId\\\":\\\"tool_7318a54b-5cf1-45c2-89c3-70cbd5b7424\\\",\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\",\\\"name\\\":\\\"read_file_v2\\\",\\\"rawArgs\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"e:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\dname\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\crm_dna-me\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\utils\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\crypto.ts\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"tool\\\":40,\\\"params\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"targetFile\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"e:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\dname\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\crm_dna-me\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\utils\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\crypto.ts\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"charsLimit\\\\\\\":1000000,\\\\\\\"effectiveUri\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"e:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\dname\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\crm_dna-me\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\utils\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\crypto.ts\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"result\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n// src/utils/crypto.ts\\\\\\\\n// AES-256-GCM Encryption Utilities for sensitive data (passwords, tokens)\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nimport crypto from 'crypto';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst ALGORITHM = 'aes-256-gcm';\\\\\\\\nconst IV_LENGTH = 16;\\\\\\\\nconst AUTH_TAG_LENGTH = 16;\\\\\\\\nconst KEY_LENGTH = 32; // 256 bits\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// Lazy-loaded encryption key (validated on first use, not at import time)\\\\\\\\nlet _encryptionKey: Buffer | null = null;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunction getEncryptionKey(): Buffer {\\\\\\\\n  if (_encryptionKey) return _encryptionKey;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const keyHex = process.env.ENCRYPTION_KEY;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  if (!keyHex) {\\\\\\\\n    throw new Error(\\\\\\\\n      'ENCRYPTION_KEY environment variable is not set. ' +\\\\\\\\n      'Generate one with: node -e \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"console.log(require(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\'crypto\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\').randomBytes(32).toString(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\'hex\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\'))\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"'\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  if (!/^[0-9a-fA-F]{64}$/.test(keyHex)) {\\\\\\\\n    throw new Error(\\\\\\\\n      'ENCRYPTION_KEY must be exactly 64 hex characters (32 bytes). ' +\\\\\\\\n      'Generate one with: node -e \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"console.log(require(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\'crypto\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\').randomBytes(32).toString(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\'hex\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\'))\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"'\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  _encryptionKey = Buffer.from(keyHex, 'hex');\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  if (_encryptionKey.length !== KEY_LENGTH) {\\\\\\\\n    throw new Error(&#96;ENCRYPTION_KEY must decode to exactly ${KEY_LENGTH} bytes.&#96;);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  return _encryptionKey;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Encrypts a plaintext string using AES-256-GCM.\\\\\\\\n *\\\\\\\\n * Returns a combined string in the format: iv:authTag:ciphertext (all hex-encoded).\\\\\\\\n * The IV is randomly generated per encryption call, ensuring unique ciphertexts\\\\\\\\n * even for identical plaintexts.\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport function encrypt(text: string): string {\\\\\\\\n  const key = getEncryptionKey();\\\\\\\\n  const iv = crypto.randomBytes(IV_LENGTH);\\\\\\\\n  const cipher = crypto.createCipheriv(ALGORITHM, key, iv);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  let encrypted = cipher.update(text, 'utf8', 'hex');\\\\\\\\n  encrypted += cipher.final('hex');\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const authTag = cipher.getAuthTag();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // Format: iv:authTag:ciphertext\\\\\\\\n  return &#96;${iv.toString('hex')}:${authTag.toString('hex')}:${encrypted}&#96;;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Decrypts a string that was encrypted with &#96;encrypt()&#96;.\\\\\\\\n *\\\\\\\\n * Expects the format: iv:authTag:ciphertext (all hex-encoded).\\\\\\\\n * Throws if the data has been tampered with (GCM authentication failure).\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport function decrypt(encryptedData: string): string {\\\\\\\\n  const key = getEncryptionKey();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const parts = encryptedData.split(':');\\\\\\\\n  if (parts.length !== 3) {\\\\\\\\n    throw new Error('Invalid encrypted data format. Expected iv:authTag:ciphertext');\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const [ivHex, authTagHex, ciphertext] = parts;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  if (!ivHex || !authTagHex || !ciphertext) {\\\\\\\\n    throw new Error('Invalid encrypted data format. All parts must be non-empty.');\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const iv = Buffer.from(ivHex, 'hex');\\\\\\\\n  const authTag = Buffer.from(authTagHex, 'hex');\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  if (iv.length !== IV_LENGTH) {\\\\\\\\n    throw new Error(&#96;Invalid IV length: expected ${IV_LENGTH} bytes, got ${iv.length}&#96;);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  if (authTag.length !== AUTH_TAG_LENGTH) {\\\\\\\\n    throw new Error(&#96;Invalid auth tag length: expected ${AUTH_TAG_LENGTH} bytes, got ${authTag.length}&#96;);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const decipher = crypto.createDecipheriv(ALGORITHM, key, iv);\\\\\\\\n  decipher.setAuthTag(authTag);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  let decrypted = decipher.update(ciphertext, 'hex', 'utf8');\\\\\\\\n  decrypted += decipher.final('utf8');\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  return decrypted;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Checks whether a string looks like it was encrypted by &#96;encrypt()&#96;.\\\\\\\\n * This is a format check only โ it does NOT verify decryptability.\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport function isEncrypted(value: string): boolean {\\\\\\\\n  const parts = value.split(':');\\\\\\\\n  if (parts.length !== 3) return false;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const [ivHex, authTagHex, ciphertext] = parts;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  return (\\\\\\\\n    /^[0-9a-fA-F]{32}$/.test(ivHex) &amp;&amp;       // 16 bytes IV = 32 hex chars\\\\\\\\n    /^[0-9a-fA-F]{32}$/.test(authTagHex) &amp;&amp;   // 16 bytes auth tag = 32 hex chars\\\\\\\\n    /^[0-9a-fA-F]+$/.test(ciphertext) &amp;&amp;       // non-empty hex ciphertext\\\\\\\\n    ciphertext.length &gt; 0\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Generates a new random encryption key (for initial setup / key rotation).\\\\\\\\n * Returns a 64-character hex string (32 bytes).\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport function generateEncryptionKey(): string {\\\\\\\\n  return crypto.randomBytes(KEY_LENGTH).toString('hex');\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Resets the cached encryption key. Useful for testing or key rotation.\\\\\\\\n * After calling this, the next encrypt/decrypt call will re-read ENCRYPTION_KEY from env.\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport function resetEncryptionKey(): void {\\\\\\\\n  _encryptionKey = null;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":138}\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"6d0aec00-fce1-4030-a566-0a8384389cfe\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"5bd39a47-b753-494f-b36c-a59933fab662\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-02-17T12:47:47.217Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n// Create Pool\\\\\\\\n// pool.on('error', (err) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n      console.error('โ PostgreSQL pool error:', err.message);\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    pool.on('remove', () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n      console.log('PostgreSQL client removed from pool');\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  return pool;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// Create Pool with connection string from config\\\\\\\\n2. ๐งฌ DNA Marketing Engine\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nA custom CRM platform with Smart Routing &amp; Intent Detection for the biotech industry.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Features\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- **Event Ingestion**: Receive marketing events from multiple channels (Waalaxy, Lemlist, Website, Ads, Conferences)\\\\\\\\n- **Lead Scoring**: Real-time scoring with configurable rules and decay mechanism\\\\\\\\n- **Intent Detection**: Automatic detection of product intent (Research Lab, B2B Lab, Co-Creation)\\\\\\\\n- **Smart Routing**: Intelligent routing to the correct pipeline based on score + intent\\\\\\\\n- **Automation Engine**: Automated stage movements, notifications, and task creation\\\\\\\\n- **Integrations**: Moco (German finance) and Slack (alerts &amp; notifications)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Tech Stack\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n| Component | Technology |\\\\\\\\n|-----------|------------|\\\\\\\\n| Runtime | Node.js 20+ |\\\\\\\\n| Framework | Fastify |\\\\\\\\n| Database | PostgreSQL 15+ |\\\\\\\\n| Queue | Redis + BullMQ |\\\\\\\\n| Language | TypeScript (strict) |\\\\\\\\n| Validation | Zod |\\\\\\\\n| Migrations | node-pg-migrate |\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Prerequisites\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- Node.js 20+\\\\\\\\n- Docker and Docker Compose\\\\\\\\n- npm v9+\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Quick Start\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 1. Clone and Install\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\\\\\\\\ngit clone &lt;repository-url&gt;\\\\\\\\ncd dna-marketing-engine\\\\\\\\nnpm install\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 2. Environment Setup\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\\\\\\\\n# Copy example environment file\\\\\\\\ncp env.example .env\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# Edit .env with your configuration\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 3. Start Infrastructure\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\\\\\\\\n# Start PostgreSQL and Redis\\\\\\\\ndocker-compose up -d\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# Wait for services to be healthy\\\\\\\\ndocker-compose ps\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 4. Run Migrations\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\\\\\\\\n# Apply database migrations\\\\\\\\nnpm run migrate:up\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# Or manually:\\\\\\\\ndocker exec -i dna_postgres psql -U dna -d dna_marketing &lt; migrations/1737475200000_initial-schema.sql\\\\\\\\ndocker exec -i dna_postgres psql -U dna -d dna_marketing &lt; migrations/1737475200001_seed-pipelines.sql\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 5. Seed Data (Optional)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\\\\\\\\nnpm run seed\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 6. Start Development\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\\\\\\\\n# Terminal 1: Start API server with hot reload\\\\\\\\nnpm run dev\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# Terminal 2: Start background workers\\\\\\\\nnpm run workers\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"signatures\\\\\\\":{},\\\\\\\"detailedLines\\\\\\\":[{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"# ๐งฌ DNA Marketing Engine\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":1},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":2},{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"A custom CRM platform with Smart Routing &amp; \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"uuid-ossp\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\";\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n-- ORGANIZATIONS\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE organizations (\\\\\\\\n    id              UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),\\\\\\\\n    name            VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\n    domain          VARCHAR(255),\\\\\\\\n    industry        VARCHAR(100),\\\\\\\\n    company_size    VARCHAR(50),\\\\\\\\n    country         VARCHAR(2),\\\\\\\\n    portal_id       VARCHAR(100) UNIQUE,\\\\\\\\n    moco_id         VARCHAR(50),\\\\\\\\n    metadata        JSONB DEFAULT '{}',\\\\\\\\n    created_at      TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),\\\\\\\\n    updated_at      TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()\\\\\\\\n);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n-- PIPELINES\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE pipelines (\\\\\\\\n    id              UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),\\\\\\\\n    slug            VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE,\\\\\\\\n    name            VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\n    description     TEXT,\\\\\\\\n    is_active       BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,\\\\\\\\n    is_default      BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,\\\\\\\\n    sales_cycle_days INTEGER,\\\\\\\\n    target_persona  VARCHAR(255),\\\\\\\\n    config          JSONB DEFAULT '{}',\\\\\\\\n    created_at      TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()\\\\\\\\n);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n-- PIPELINE STAGES\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE pipeline_stages (\\\\\\\\n    id              UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT client.query('BEGIN');\\\\\\\\n      const result = await callback(client);\\\\\\\\n      await client.query('COMMIT');\\\\\\\\n      return result;\\\\\\\\n    } catch (error) {\\\\\\\\n      await
